name: Flowchart (decision + loop)
author: OpenTikZ contributors
description: Standard flowchart: terminal pills (start/end), process rectangles, a decision diamond with Yes/No branches, and a retry loop. Parametric spacing and labels.

parameters.name: \rowsep
parameters.meaning: vertical gap between steps (tikz node distance)

edit_contract.node_naming: fixed semantic node names: (start) (read) (check) (proc) (end) (error); give any new node a clear semantic name

operations.summary: insert a process node below=of the previous one and re-point the surrounding flow arrows
add a decision node and route its two outgoing flow arrows, labelling each branch
swap a node's style: process<->decision<->terminal (give a decision a ? label)
use a trapezium (slanted box) for an I/O step; shapes.geometric is already loaded
change the palette name in the relevant style; never a hex/stock color

invariants: preserve the node names (start) (read) (check) (proc) (end) (error) and the per-role styles terminal/process/decision
label every decision's outgoing edges (Yes/No or equivalent)
colors only via the five palette names (tints/shades allowed); never inline hex or stock colors
